scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @taro/core && npm run build --workspace @taro/studio
scripts.check: npm run docs:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @taro/core && npm run test --workspace @taro/studio
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @taro/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @taro/studio
